subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou knowest and seest what hath befallen Thy chosen ones and trusted servants in Thy lands, who have raised their voices in Thy remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی تعلم و تری ما ورد علی اصفیائک و امنائک فی بلادک الذین نطقوا بذکرک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
